purpose: Minimal packet for QuantLab thread to complete ACK and read QBVS evidence without duplicating QBVS validation work.
active_goal: Validate behavior-rule trading strategies, not portfolio allocation, against user floors; QBVS owns validation and external evidence bundles, QuantLab owns ACK, approval, display, and ResearchBus main schema.

required_values.quantlab_entrypoint: non-empty QuantLab module/page/command that reads QBVS evidence

hard_boundaries: Do not write QuantLab database from QBVS evidence.
Do not write QuantLab source from QBVS evidence.
Do not promote any strategy to approved strategy library without QuantLab exact review and user approval.
Do not rerun QBVS long validation or OpenD batch fetch from QuantLab just to complete ACK.
Treat QBVS evidence as ReviewOnly external evidence until closed-loop ACK passes.
current_blockers: OpenD historical K-line quota constrained: 39 quota failures remain in batch81-140 retry plan; avoid batch OpenD history refetch until quota recovers.
qbvs_side_next_after_ack: Run: PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m qbvs.cli verify-handshake --ack handoff/quantlab_handshake_ack.json.
Resume only the smallest verification needed for the active QBVS pursuing goal.
Do not trigger OpenD batch refetch until historical K-line quota recovers.
Use public-history or replacement-to-200 resumable campaign only if it directly closes the remaining readiness partial item.
